meaning: n.<法>儿子,伊拉克、约旦、科威特等国的铜币
examples: On April 10th Pinault fils announced the biggest deal of his career so far.
Dulong Freres et Fils was founded in 1873 in the village of Floirac, near Bordeaux.
Alexandre Dumas fils(junior), French playwright, especially La Dame aux Camelias, was born in Paris.
The drink originally got its name from a brand of French cognac named Sazerac-de-Forge et Fils.
Fils-Aime said the new controls for the Nintendo 3DS will lead to new types of games.
